leak_figure_basis: Custom, sized to Instaloft: ~4 senior leaders at a ~£22.5m group, est. ~£620k combined pay, ~10% on low-leverage work, halved by redesign = ~£31k/yr. Conservative vs the £1.04m generic benchmark.
fit_verdict: FIT (solid). UK, founder/CEO with full P&L authority, group ~£22.5m turnover (+57% YoY), 150+ staff, multi-brand/multi-depot complexity, founder just built the leadership layer. Sector is construction-services (loft boarding) rather than pure energy/construction contractor, but complexity + growth carry the fit.
publish_status: BLOCKED on thetransformationexchange.report domain (not yet registered). Build + QA + stage only.
